overall.description: A third-person game engine scene showing a character in a long dark coat walking through a snowy, moonlit landscape at night. The character traverses from an open field into narrow stone passages and ancient ruins, illuminated by warm lantern posts against the blue winter night.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy field with scattered lantern posts

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily through snow-covered field toward distant lights, coat swaying with each step

entered.detail: tall wooden post with warm orange glowing lantern at the top, illuminating the snow
snow-covered ground with patches of exposed stone and grass
small structure with glowing windows visible in the distance
low stone wall partially covered in snow
tufts of brown grass poking through the snow

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide-open snowy field at night, passing traditional lantern posts that cast warm light against the blue snow. The landscape is quiet and empty, with distant lit buildings visible on the horizon and patches of dry grass scattered across the snow-covered ground.

events.description: character enters narrow passage between tall rock walls, transitioning from open field to enclosed canyon

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow stone corridor flanked by high rock walls, following the lantern-lit path

entered.detail: tall dark rock wall forming the left side of the narrow passage
tall dark rock wall forming the right side of the narrow passage
stone pavers forming a path through the snow

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, enclosed stone passage with tall rock walls on both sides blocking the sky. The path is lit by lantern posts placed along the stone pavers, creating a sheltered corridor through the ancient rock formation.

events.description: exiting narrow canyon into wider area with ancient stone ruins and broken walls

agents.ego_description: navigating through ancient stone ruins following the lantern-lit path, occasionally turning slightly

entered.detail: weathered stone walls of ancient ruins, partially collapsed
fallen stone column lying among the ruins

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow canyon into a wider area filled with ancient stone ruins. The path winds through broken walls and fallen pillars, illuminated by lantern posts that cast long shadows across the snow-covered stone pavers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a vast, moonlit snowy expanse into a confined stone corridor and finally into a field of ancient ruins. It begins in a wide-open field where the character passes warm lantern posts that contrast with the deep blue of the snow and distant horizon buildings. As the character advances, the open landscape narrows and shifts into an enclosed stone passage, where tall rock walls rise on both sides to block the sky. The scene then opens up as the character emerges from the canyon into a wider area of broken walls and fallen pillars. Finally, the camera follows the winding path through these ruins, where lantern posts cast long shadows across the snow-covered stone pavers.
